div.head: The Secretary of State to the French Ambassador (Jusserand)
div.p: Excellency: I have the honor to address Your Excellency concerning the aid extended to American citizens by the captain of the Messageries Maritimes Steamer André Lebon in Yokohama harbor at the moment of the recent disaster which occurred in Japan on Saturday, September 1.

The captain of the steamer received refugees and wounded, sent his boats ashore to aid those who escaped the flames to reach a place of safety and extended to them, when on board, every comfort and courtesy.

I beg that Your Excellency will be kind enough to request the French Government to advise the captain of the André Lebon of the high appreciation of this Government for the assistance which the captain rendered to American citizens.
